title: AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur)
shortInfo: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur has released the official notification for 4 Project Technical Support III posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur has released the official notification for 4 Project Technical Support III posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates is up to a maximum period of 5 years. Age relaxation for OBC candidates is up to a maximum period of 3 years. Age relaxation up to 5 years may be granted to deserving candidates having experience of working in Government Research Organization on a case-to-case basis, by DG, ICMR/Head of the Institution.

qualification.education_qualification: Three years graduate in relevant subject/field (Medical Social work (Community development/Social Welfare/Medical) or (Sociology/psychology/life sciences + three years' experience (in the field-based research) or PG degree in relevant subject/field (Medical social work/anthropology).
qualification.details: Three years graduate in relevant subject/field (Medical Social work (Community development/Social Welfare/Medical) or (Sociology/psychology/life sciences + three years' experience (in the field-based research) or PG degree in relevant subject/field (Medical social work/anthropology).

salary_details.details: Rs. 28000 Per Month + HRA (20% of basic)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Nagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Technical Support III posts at AIIMS Nagpur is 03 June 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support III post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Project Technical Support III position at AIIMS Nagpur. These positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a three-year graduate degree in a relevant subject/field such as Medical Social Work, Sociology, Psychology, or Life Sciences with three years of experience in field-based research. Alternatively, a PG degree in Medical Social Work or Anthropology is also accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Technical Support III post is 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28,000 per month, along with HRA which is 20% of the basic pay.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support III recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Technical Support III posts will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the role.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support III recruitment is entirely online. Candidates must visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Nagpur located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Nagpur is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra. The recruitment is for positions within this institute.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations available?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxations are available. SC/ST candidates can get up to 5 years of relaxation, and OBC candidates can get up to 3 years. Further relaxation may be granted to deserving candidates with experience in government research organizations.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Technical Support III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Technical Support III posts at AIIMS Nagpur is 03 June 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.
